ShortDescription.Value: Scale Public Transit, Passengers, Industry Cargo + Delivery, Road + Parks vehicles, and increase Transit Line slider limits.

Publish.LongDescription:
### Public Works Plus (PWP)
Everything is OPTIONAL - you choose!
- Scale **fleet sizes**, *vehicle capacities* in: all Public Transit, Parks/Roads Maintenance, All Industry Deliveries, Cargo stations, Extractors. - Includes everything from *Adjust Transit Capacity* (ATC) mod AND all the new mods below are *combined* into one PwP mod.
### Features - new Transit Line adjuster (when you only want 1 bus or need ~30-60 buses). - new *Parks + Roads Repairs*: fleet size, work shift, and rate - new Road wear (alpha): scale speed roads accumulate damage over time - new **Industry Deliveries**: scale cargo capacity for delivery vehicles (Semi trucks, Delivery vans, Motorbike delivery, Raw material trucks - coal, oil, etc.) - new *Extractor companies*: Fish, Grain, etc.; scale max fleet size (usually semi trucks) - new *Cargo Stations*: scale max fleet of cargo stations (harbor/train/airport)
#### Complete ATC features included
- **Transit depots:** change max vehicles per depot (Bus, Ferry, Subway, Taxi, Tram, Train) - **Passengers:** change maximum seats (Bus, Tram, Train, Subway, Ship, Ferry, Airplane)
### Notes 🚍🚋🚆✈️🚢 - *Remove* "Adjust Transit Capacity" if you install this mod. - *Adjust Sliders* at any time, no restart needed; supports switching cities. - *Depot capacity* = maximum number of vehicles a single depot can maintain/spawn (extension building not scaled). - Avoid other depot/passenger capacity mods to avoid conflicts (they override each other). - No Harmony or Reflection used; more compatible - less likely to break on patch days. - Safe to remove any time (use Reset buttons to return to vanilla game default values). - ✅ New Toggle, Transit Line: it's your choice if you want to use the PwP version. Pick one - Don't use other mods that also adjust the in-game slider (e.g. Transport Policy Adjuster). If both are enabled, it's not going to explode, it may be inconsistent like two people changing the radio station. - PwP Transit lines: follows the game’s method (travel time + stops); you can have just 1 bus per line or ~30-60+ buses (see before/after screenshot). PwP is made differently than older mods; no Harmony patch used and maximum is not static (will not be 250 buses on one line). You still get many more buses per each route line than game vanilla gives.
### Support and feedback - If the mod helps you, give it a Like, it's free + easy :) - This mod is 5 new mods combined +ATC; feedback was to combine more features into a single mod. All details may not be above, but might be answered in forums or in tool tips of the mod. - Feedback on: Github, Discord, etc., links on this page.
### Credits - River-Mochi: author - yenyang: code review and testing. - The Transit section is inspired by Wayz's original Depot Capacity Changer. - Necko1996: testing - BugsyG: testing
### Performance advantage This is designed to *not* run in the city per-frame. Player makes changes in Options Menu > then mod goes idle. Debug tools are off by default.
### 11 Languages
- English, Français, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Polski Polish, Português Brazilian - 한국어, 日本語, 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese), 繁體中文 Traditional Chinese
### Tip: If you want to increase maximum of the transit route slider a little more, add some stops to the route. Game auto-increases the max based on different factors, adding stops is just the easiest to nudge.
tags: city dispatch, transit line increase, control municipal, public transit system, change size, increase people passengers, depot size demand, decrease passengers, delivery trucks vans, industry semi-trucks, cargo station depot capacity, Extractor, fish
Publish.ChangeLog: - minor, accidentally uploaded wrong mod ID.
